title: i miss my family
author: corbin
body:
i spend way too much time just doomscrolling my facebook feed. i always see updates from my mom passing by since shes the most active on there. my sister is too young for facebook anyway, and my brother never posts. i dont live near them anymore. i still message my brother on instagram sometimes, but its really rare now. i can barely bring myself to actually reach out to them- or my mom mostly- because i know exactly what i am now. im 
just 
a 
fucking
embarrassment. 
thinking about my brother hits the hardest. i always looked up to him
more than anyone else in the world. but i always felt like he secretly
hated my guts and thought i was a pathetic loser. i got it in my head
that if i could just be numb, or force myself to get into the dark fucked
up shit, maybe he'd actually respect me and want me around. so i started
making myself watch really violent videos.
it got really fucking bad back in 2022. i would just sit in my room
frying my brain with videos of the absolute worst things happening to
people, trying to prove to myself that i could handle it. i thought it
would forge some kind of bond between us. i managed to quit
around 2023. my body kind of started rejecting it on its own. i got
squeamish and honestly just couldn't stomach it without feeling
completely sick.
but i started again earlier this year. i hate admitting that. it's so hard
to stop once you force that door back open. you get this weird numb feeling
while you're watching, but the second the video ends and the screen goes
black, the remorse hits me very hard. i just sit there staring at my own reflection in the monitor feeling absolute pure 
disgust
with 
myself.
i miss them so much. i miss being normal. i miss when i didn't have all this ugly shit rotting away in my head. i just want to be a normal brother and a normal son but i feel like i'm way too far gone (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WIDlLgOsLfM) now. so i just sit here in my room hitting refresh on the feed like a fucking ghost (skintone matches the hue of a ghost too).
